title: Atomically confined excitons in 2D perovskites for bright and sub-nanosecond scintillation
description: A new method uses atomic-level exciton confinement in 2D perovskites to create ultrafast, highly efficient scintillators for advanced radiation imaging.

title: Planet Sizes and Locations in Our Solar System
description: This is a simple guide to the sizes of planets based on the equatorial diameter – or width – at the equator of each planet.

title: Earth
source: Planet Sizes and Locations in Our Solar System
description: Earth – our home planet – is the third planet from the Sun, and the fifth largest planet. It's the only place we know of inhabited by living things.
